name: Susuk Rupawan
overview: Stay tuned for the drama Susuk Rupawan which will haunt viewers starting January 7, 2026, every Monday to Thursday, at 10.00 pm on TV3's Samarinda slot and can also be streamed. A mystical thriller drama directed by Amor Rizan produced by Global Stations and scripted by Liza Nur. Starring Cahaya Nilam, Adam Lee, Darien Aeldra, Shah Rezza and Watie Sadali

trailers.title: Full Review & Sinopsis Penuh Drama Episod Susuk Rupawan, Pelakon (Cast) - TV3 & Tonton
